channel.title: selenium on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in selenium on IT notes

item.title: webscraping
item.description: Webscraping using python + chrome In mac OS X, install chromedriver and selenium: brew install chromedriver Install selenium via pip: pip install -U selenium if required to install globally sudo pip install selenium To test, open a terminal, type python and try: Python 2.7.12 (default, Oct 11 2016, 05:20:59) [GCC 4.2.1 Compatible Apple LLVM 8.0.0 (clang-800.0.38)] on darwin Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
